items.reason: The PR replaces log_rate_limit with three sample-rate knobs, but this doc still says sampling granularity is request-only and claims full backward compatibility despite removing log_rate_limit/client env compatibility.
This canonical logging design doc still documents log_rate_limit, DATASYSTEM_LOG_RATE_LIMIT, LogRateLimiter hot-path behavior, and worker-to-client log_rate_limit sync.

Trace context behavior changed to LogSampler/request_sample_rate semantics, but this doc still says SetRequestTraceUUID and SetTraceContext create decisions through local log_rate_limit and LogRateLimiter.
Access logging now has access_sample_rate pre-drop/facade behavior and updated logSampled semantics, but the existing access recorder doc was not updated.
PLOG behavior changed from bypassing request sampling to diagnostic_sample_rate/request sampled-in handling, but this plan still describes the old log_rate_limit bypass design.
